view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied as evidenced by the system's behavior.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied as evidenced by the system's behavior.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step confirms that the requirement for a unique link per meeting is met through the successful execution of the use case, which includes the automatic creation of a unique Zoom meeting link upon booking. The evidence provided in the linked use case details the entire process, including the generation of a unique Zoom meeting link and its inclusion in the confirmation email, thus demonstrating that the integration is functional. This directly supports the requirement of having a unique link per meeting for security purposes.
